category_sources: Official homepage describes SISC as an extensible Java based interpreter of Scheme.
source_facts.description says Extensive Java based Scheme interpreter.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title expands SISC as Second Interpreter of Scheme Code.
source_facts.name is sisc-scheme; official project branding is SISC.
docs_sources: Official Documentation page provides SISC for Seasoned Schemers and API Javadocs.
Official SISC homepage links a Documentation page.
repo_sources: Official SISC homepage links CVS and the SourceForge project as its support/source hosting surface.
tags_sources: Official homepage says SISC supports the full R5RS Scheme standard and Java foreign-function interface.
source_facts.description identifies a Java based Scheme interpreter.
